about.section-1: My name is Dora Duszin, I'm a full-stack freelance software developer with over 7 years of experience across diverse industries and technologies.
about.section-2: I'm based in Valencia, Spain - but have had the chance to cooperate with many international teams across Europe.
about.section-3: I was able to collaborate with clients ...
I was able to collaborate with clients ...
about.section-4: ... and beyond technical proficiency, gain substantial experience in collaborative agile environments, offering strong communication skills in multiple languages.
about.section-5: Explore my site to discover how we can collaborate and drive excellence together!

experience-services.section-1: Over the years I consistently delivered high-quality and reliable software for leading clients using the latest technologies.
experience-services.section-2: My expertise spans a wide range of programming languages and tools covering both front and backend development.
experience-services.section-3: Beyond technical proficiency I value creativity, teamwork and flexibility.
experience-services.section-4: I thrive in collaborative agile environments, offering strong communication skills in English, Spanish and Hungarian.

skills.frontend: TypeScript, JavaScript, Angular, React, Ionic, Node.js, PrimeNG, Angular Material, Bootstrap, DevExpress, HTML, CSS
skills.backend: Java, Kotlin, C#, Spring, Spring Boot, .Net, .Net Core, MongoDb, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hibernate, Entity Framework, Maven, Gradle, Ant
skills.devops-other: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Bamboo, AWS, Azure, CloudFoundry, Elasticsearch, JUnit5, Jira, Confluence, Git, GitHub, Bitbucket

projects.description-1: For the past 4 years, I have been collaborating with devpoint GmbH, a distinguished Swiss agile software development company, reputable for its diverse clientele and projects.
projects.description-2: As a freelance contributor, I've had the privilege of working on 3 distinct projects across different sectors, actively engaging in delivering tailored solutions to meet the needs of each client.
projects.description-3: These experiences have enhanced my abilities to navigate and adapt to diverse project scopes, working with several different teams and technical approaches.
projects.description-4: For a comprehensive overview of my professional journey, please refer to my full employment and education history by clicking below.

project-1.title: Administration System and Webshop
project-1.description: Full-stack web development of an innovative administration system and webshop for a leading Swiss cable & satellite client providing IT- and cloud services, network, datacenter and internet.

summary.first: Webshop for ordering network, IT- and cloud service-related products, services, and bundles tailored for both residential and business users.
summary.second: Web-based administration platform utilized by the client's employees and dedicated admin users for managing internal processes, offers, and more.

tasks.first: Key member of the full-stack web development and testing team for an innovative administration system and webshop
tasks.second: Improving design, architecture and database construction while overseeing the entire software development lifecycle
tasks.third: Ensuring optimal functionality and seamless user experience to drive profitable sales

detailed-description.stack: Angular, TypeScript, PrimeNG, HTML, CSS, Java, Spring Boot, MongoDb, Maven, XML, SOAP, Docker, AWS, Jira, Confluence, Git, Bitbucket

project-2.title: Cloud Storage and Synchronization Service
project-2.description: Microservice development and migration of a cloud storage service for a prominent Swiss telecommunications and ICT service provider serving residential and business customers in Switzerland and Italy.

detailed-description.client: Swiss telecommunications and ICT service provider

summary.first: Cross-platform cloud storage and synchronization service with features like automatic backup, serving 5k+ monthly new users in Switzerland.
summary.second: Backend team member in an agile (SCRUM) environment.

tasks.first: Executed microservice development, migration and refactoring using the latest technologies
tasks.second: Collaborated with Android and iOS teams ensuring fast and secure file management across multiple devices
tasks.third: Facilitated efficient file processing for automatic backup and synchronization

detailed-description.stack: Java, Reactive Java, Kotlin, MongoDb, Spring Boot, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, CloudFoundry, Docker, AWS, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Grafana, Kibana, Upsource, Git

project-3.title: CAD Support and Administration System
project-3.description: Full-stack web development and enhancement of an administration platform for a proprietary CAD program developed by an international client based in Germany provisioning lightning and surge protection solutions.

detailed-description.client: International lightning and surge protection provider based in Germany

summary.first: Web-based administration and file management tool for supporting the proprietary CAD program of the client, providing general drawing and project management features, as well as a secure background for the client's webshop.

tasks.first: Full-stack development of the administration tool in an agile (SCRUM) team
tasks.second: Enhanced the existing system with nearly real-time communication through web sockets
tasks.third: Cooperated with the CAD team to plan and implement an improved file management services using Test Driven Development

detailed-description.stack: Angular, TypeScript, Angular Material, HTML, CSS, Java, Spring Boot, Azure, SQL, Maven, JUnit 5, SOAP, Web Sockets, Docker, Bamboo, Jira, Confluence, Git, GitHub, Bitbucket
